questionHtml: An observer in the spacecraft measures that events 1 and 2 are a distance of 120 ly apart. Determine, according to the spacecraft observer, the time between events 1 and 2.

meta.title: An observer in the spacecraft measures that events 1 and 2 are a distance of 120 ly apart. Determine, according to the spacecraft observer, the time between events 1 and 2.
